slides.headline: A production company sent us a brief on Monday morning.

slides.body: By Wednesday afternoon, they had 5 cleared, brief-matched tracks.
Here's how we did it in 48 hours ↓

THE BRIEF:
→ Duration: 60–90 seconds
→ Instrumentation: Afrofusion, organic elements
→ Mood: Tense, building, cinematic
→ One-stop clearance required
→ Delivery: 48 hours

We didn't scramble. We searched. Because the catalogue was built before the brief arrived:
→ Composers vetted in advance
→ Tracks tagged by mood, BPM, key, instrumentation
→ Rights confirmed for every track in the system
→ Files in spec-ready format Result: 5 tracks delivered in 24 hours. All cleared. All brief-matched. → How we received and read the brief
→ How we searched the catalogue
→ Our shortlist process
→ What we delivered and the supervisor's response
→ What this means for composers in our catalogue Speed is trust in sync. You earn it by doing the work before the brief arrives. Got a brief? DM us. #SyncLicensing #AfricanMusic #SyncMaster #MusicSupervisor #AfricanComposers

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
